title: Heatmap grid (graded N×M value matrix) report
description: Data contract for the heatmap-grid format: a dense N×M matrix of cells coloured by value, with row + column axis labels, a colour-scale legend, and marginal (row/column) totals. Supports three modes — 'risk' (likelihood × impact), 'correlation' (a correlation matrix), or 'activity' (calendar-style intensity). Colour intensity uses the single-hue brand accent ramp (tint → full --navy); when 'scale.bands' is supplied, cells are washed with the semantic ok/hold/risk tones for that band. This is NOT a 2×2 positioning plane (that is matrix-canvas) — it is a graded grid read cell-by-cell. Renders to a self-contained, themeable, interactive HTML heatmap. The sample's #report-data is a valid instance of this schema.

meta.description: Shared report chrome (org / project / title / theme). Brand-neutral: keep {{ORG}} / {{PROJECT}} / {{AUTHOR}} placeholders unless real values are supplied.

reportType.description: Eyebrow label shown above the heatmap title, e.g. 'Risk Assessment' or {{REPORT_TYPE}}.

title.description: Heatmap title shown in the .hm-head, e.g. 'Programme Risk Heatmap — Likelihood × Impact'.

subtitle.description: Optional short standfirst describing what the grid measures, e.g. 'Residual risk score (likelihood × impact) across delivery workstreams'.

theme.description: Initial brand theme; applied as <html data-theme>. Default for this format is 'teal'. 'black' is always selectable in the in-report switcher.

mode.description: Heatmap mode, selecting the framing and default legend caption. 'risk' = a likelihood × impact / severity grid (typically banded ok/hold/risk); 'correlation' = a correlation matrix (single-hue intensity ramp, often a square rows≡cols matrix); 'activity' = calendar-style activity intensity (single-hue ramp, e.g. day × week). All three render with the same grid; bands make a mode semantic.

axisLabels.description: The two axis titles framing the grid. 'x' labels the columns (shown across the top with a → arrow); 'y' labels the rows (shown rotated down the left side).

scale.description: The numeric colour scale. Cell intensity is interpolated between 'min' and 'max'. If 'bands[]' is supplied, each cell is also washed with that band's semantic tone (ok/hold/risk) and the legend shows banded swatches; otherwise the legend shows a continuous single-hue accent ramp.

min.description: Scale floor mapped to the palest tint (and the threshold-slider minimum).

max.description: Scale ceiling mapped to the fullest colour (and the threshold-slider maximum). Must be greater than min.

unit.description: Optional unit / caption for the legend and detail popover, e.g. 'score', '%', 'r', 'events'.

bands.description: Optional ordered semantic bands (low → high). Each band recolours cells at or above its 'min' with its tone. Used for 'risk' mode (e.g. Low / Medium / High). Omit for a single-hue accent ramp (typical for correlation / activity).

min.description: Lowest value (inclusive) that falls into this band.

tone.description: Semantic tone for this band. 'ok' = green (low/benign); 'hold' = amber (medium/watch); 'risk' = bordeaux (high/critical).

label.description: Optional band caption for the legend, e.g. 'Low (1–6)'.

rows.description: The grid rows (the Y axis), top to bottom in source order. Each row is one band of cells across all columns.

key.description: Stable unique row key referenced by cells[].row, e.g. 'core'.

label.description: Row label shown in the left header, e.g. 'Core ledger migration'.

sublabel.description: Optional small secondary line under the row label.

cols.description: The grid columns (the X axis), left to right in source order.

key.description: Stable unique column key referenced by cells[].col, e.g. 'sev'.

label.description: Column label shown in the top header, e.g. 'Severe'.

sublabel.description: Optional small secondary line under the column label (.ch-n).

cells.description: The graded cells. Each addresses one (row, col) intersection by key and carries a numeric value that drives its colour. A missing (row, col) pair renders as an empty (hatched) cell. Cells with value null are also treated as empty.

value.description: Numeric value on the scale. Drives the cell colour, the threshold filter, the value↔% toggle, and the marginal totals. null renders as an empty cell.

label.description: Optional display override for the big number in the detail popover (e.g. a formatted '0.82' or '25 / 25'); the underlying 'value' still drives colour and totals.

detail.description: Optional drill-detail note shown in the click/hover popover, e.g. the risk narrative for this cell.

meta.title: Programme Risk Heatmap — Likelihood × Impact
meta.subtitle: Residual risk score (likelihood × impact, 1–25) across delivery workstreams · Q2 FY26 review
meta.author: {{AUTHOR}}

cells.detail: Schema drift caught in CI; isolated blast radius.
Reconciliation lag on nightly batch.
Dual-run window overlaps month-end close.
Cut-over rollback exceeds 4h RTO target.
Ledger imbalance on go-live — regulatory reportable.
Sandbox scheme certificate renewal.
Retry storm on transient gateway 503s.
Settlement file delay past scheme deadline.
Duplicate-payment edge case under partial outage.
Scheme suspension if SLA breached twice in quarter.
Vendor sandbox throttling during load test.
38% onboarding drop-off at document step.
Sanctions-list refresh lag (4h).
False-negative on PEP screening.
Onboarding a sanctioned entity — AML breach.
Late-arriving dimension in warehouse.
Dashboard freshness lag of 30 min.
PII mis-classification in a new pipeline.
Regulatory report sourced from stale snapshot.
PII leak via mis-scoped export grant.
Cosmetic layout defect on small screens.
Biometric re-prompt loop on some devices.
Session token refresh fails offline.
Balance shown stale after a transfer.
App-store rejection delays a security patch.
Single-AZ node eviction, auto-healed.
Autoscaler lag under a traffic spike.
Region failover untested end-to-end.
Shared secret store is a single point of failure.
Multi-AZ outage with no warm standby.
